summary: 3 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Sea of Glass
film.announcement: Alexis Alexiou completed her third feature film with first look and trailer unveiled.

film.title: Varanasi
film.announcement: Director S.S. Rajamouli announced that IMAX action sequences are complete with interconnecting scenes remaining.

film.title: The Samurai and the Prisoner
film.announcement: Director Kiyoshi Kurosawa's period thriller dropped its first trailer.

tv.title: Kagurabachi
tv.announcement: Crunchyroll acquired the anime series for April 2027 release with voice actor Katsuyuki Konishi joining the cast as Togo Shiba.
